title: Example-Based Methods Classification Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of classifying a new query instance using example-based methods like k-NN.
relationships: The query instance is compared to all examples in the dataset
Distances (e.g., Euclidean) are calculated between the query and each stored example
The 'k' closest neighbors (examples) are selected based on the shortest distance
The class label for the query is determined by a majority vote (or averaging) among its nearest neighbors
